testflight_migration_notice.title: TestFlight Ending Soon
testflight_migration_notice.message: This TestFlight version has ended. Please download the app from the app store! https://apps.apple.com/us/app/pivot-sports/id6756797740

announcements.title: A Better Pivot Sports Experience
items: New onboarding experience to help you get started faster.
Refreshed app design with improved colors, typography, and visual consistency.
Smoother animations and transitions throughout the app.
Improved Events, Discussions, and Team Management screens.
Enhanced dark mode support across the app.
Various bug fixes and performance improvements.

announcements.title: App Improvements
items: Improved empty states for Events and Discussions with helpful next steps.
Added clearer login, signup, password, and email verification messages.
Improved invite sharing and onboarding experience.
Enhanced feedback submission experience and usability.
Improved dark mode readability across multiple screens.
Additional bug fixes, UI polish, and performance improvements.

announcements.title: Pivot Sports App Store Release!
items: Official App Store release of Pivot Sports.
Added Sign in with Apple support.
Added event filtering for practices, matches, meetings, and more.
Added pull-to-refresh support across Events, Groups, Discussions, Members, and Profile screens.
Enhanced login and password flows with visibility toggles and improved validation.
Updated team settings, member management, and group UI styling.
Improved dark mode support and responsiveness across devices.
General bug fixes, UI polish, and performance improvements.

announcements.title: Pivot Sports Update!
items: Improved app stability and overall performance.
Fixed interaction issues on older devices and improved responsiveness.
Improved discussions, events, and overall team experience.
Polished UI and smoother navigation experience.
Final TestFlight update before official App Store release.

announcements.title: Pivot Sports Update - 0.3.11
items: New feedback form
Improved notifications for discussions and pending requests.
Password reset now supported with deep link recovery flow.
Better validation for password reset and account security.
Enhanced discussion UI with cleaner, card-based layout.
General improvements to group activity and member interactions.
Fixed bottom bar on older phones

announcements.title: Pivot Sports Update - 0.3.1
items: Added a header section to the Group Home view for a clearer team overview.
Notification settings UI improvements.
Better handling of group activity and member interactions.
UI improvements and better layout support for older iPhones.

announcements.title: Pivot Sports Update
items: Improved team discussions and comment notifications.
Event creation and RSVP experience has been refined.
Performance improvements and UI polish across the app.
More updates and features coming soon.

announcements.title: Pivot Sports MVP is Live
items: Create teams and invite members with a simple code.
Start discussions to keep your team connected.
Create events and track RSVPs in one place.
Early version — more features and improvements coming soon.
